tasks.title: Remove stale linter allow directives
tasks.notes: Removed unnecessary #![allow(...)] directives from builtins/array.rs and builtins/object.rs since files are under 500 lines and lint passes. The build.rs linter does not use #[allow(...)] exemptions - it uses '// linter-skip' opt-out instead.

tasks.title: Interpreter performance roadmap
tasks.notes: rustc-hash and indexmap added. Benchmarks created in tests/benchmarks.rs. Remaining: NaN-boxing, string interning, object shapes, slot-indexed environments. Future optimizations once runtime is correct: NaN-boxed Value, string interning, object shapes+ICs, slot-indexed environments, arena allocation.

tasks.title: Reactive execution engine over the HIR
tasks.notes: Future work; depends on Task 22 HIR.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript's own conformance runner for reference
Run TypeScript's own compiler runner for baseline validation
tasks.notes: Use tests/typescript's compilerRunner/hereby to generate or verify .js baselines for categories where Quench results are unclear.

tasks.title: Expand conformance whitelist as runtime support grows
tasks.notes: Add modules, async/await, generators, decorators, JSX, and other categories to the whitelist once the runtime supports them.

tasks.title: Validate conformance results with TypeScript's own runner
tasks.notes: Use npx hereby runtests --runners=conformance --tests=<name> --dirty to generate local baselines and confirm expected output.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript compiler and project runners for reference baselines
tasks.notes: Use hereby --runner=compiler,conformance,project,transpile to generate local baselines and confirm expected JS output.

tasks.title: Make conformance harnesses stable for full-suite runs
tasks.notes: Implemented per-case context isolation, depth reset, and timeout support. All tests pass. Full-suite runs still require per-case timeout isolation to prevent stack overflow.

tasks.title: Fix Promise constructor and Math.imul bugs
tasks.notes: Fixed 12 failing tests: (1) Math.imul was casting to u32 first, losing sign on negative numbers - now casts to i32 first; (2) Promise constructor was being overwritten by eval with an object literal, making typeof Promise === 'object' instead of 'function' - restructured to store Promise as callable Object with __promise_constructor__ marker; (3) Promise objects returned from static methods and prototype methods lacked proper prototype chain for instanceof checks - added create_promise_with_prototype() and updated all creation sites.

tasks.title: Split monolithic runtime files to meet 500 line/file limit
tasks.notes: Completed: Split value.rs into value/ module (✓ done). Split interpreter.rs (1081 lines) into interpreter/ module with control.rs, statement.rs, expression.rs, member.rs, operator.rs, call.rs. Split lower.rs (984 lines) into lower/ module with error.rs, helpers.rs, binding.rs, module.rs, statement.rs, expression.rs, operator.rs. All files are now under 500 lines (max is 338). All tests pass, examples work.

tasks.title: Fix Array Destructuring and 'this' Binding in Constructor
tasks.notes: Fixed 3 critical bugs: (1) Array destructuring with numeric index was using computed=false instead of computed=true in lower.rs - fixed to correctly generate Member expressions; (2) The interpreter was not handling PropertyKey::Number when computed=true - added support for this case; (3) Block statements containing only VarDeclarations were creating unnecessary scopes, causing var declarations to be lost when scope was popped - fixed to not push scope for var-only blocks; (4) 'this' was undefined in constructor functions called with 'new' - fixed by setting this_val on call environment in call_value_with_this(). All examples (counter.js, use-bridge.tsx, animations.tsx) now work correctly.

tasks.title: Fix Lint Violations and Line Count Limits
tasks.notes: Completed: (1) Split builtins/array.rs (527 lines) into array.rs (70 lines) and array_methods.rs (469 lines) to meet 500 line/file limit; (2) Removed invalid clippy lint names (clippy::function_body_length) from builtins files; (3) Fixed all clippy warnings: redundant_closure, needless_borrow, match_like_matches_macro, useless_format, get_first, map_identity, manual_clamp, unnecessary_cast, type_complexity. Added type aliases in promise.rs. All tests pass, examples work, zero clippy warnings.

tasks.title: Fix Build-time Lint Violations from build.rs
tasks.notes: Fixed lint violations detected by build.rs: (1) array_methods.rs register_array_methods function (427 lines, complexity 72) - split into 22 small helper functions, each under 40 lines; (2) runtime_issues.rs (680 lines) - split into: runtime_issues_control_flow.rs (91), runtime_issues_math.rs (196), runtime_issues_number.rs (111), runtime_issues_prototypes.rs (193), runtime_issues_timers.rs (53); (3) depth_limit.rs function (58 lines) - split into smaller helper functions. All tests pass, build passes.

tasks.title: Add missing JavaScript operators (nullish coalescing, optional chaining, unary plus)
tasks.notes: Added: (1) Nullish coalescing ??, (2) Optional chaining ?., (3) Unary plus +, (4) Delete operator, (5) Logical assignment operators ||=, &&=, ??=. test262 pass rate improved from 10.4% to 13.4% (16 more tests passing).

tasks.title: Analyze and enable whole-suite conformance runs
tasks.notes: Documented blockers: recursive interpreter stack overflow, global CURRENT_DEPTH counter, huge unsupported feature surface, baseline/harness gaps, runtime bugs. Plan: stabilize, generate full reports, fix bugs with regression tests, expand supported features.

tasks.title: Improve conformance harness reporting
tasks.notes: Added pass rate, top failure signatures, per-category breakdown, and Markdown reports for both test262 and TypeScript harnesses. Reports are written to target/*.md and target/*.json.

tasks.title: Conformance-driven bug fixing workflow
tasks.notes: Documented workflow: run harness, pick top failure bucket, write focused regression test, fix runtime, verify bucket shrinks. Current top buckets include ReferenceError for class/namespace declarations, No baseline found, and is not a function.
